name: Gourmet Gusto
description: Gourmet Gusto is the chef counterpart of Gusto in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Gourmet Gusto is the chef counterpart of Gusto in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was first released in May 2015 and is recognized as the last Skylander exclusive to the mobile game.
quote: Gourmet Gusto is bringing some flavor to the Lost Islands!
personality: While not explicitly detailed in lore, his role as a 'Gourmet' chef counterpart to Gusto suggests a passion for culinary arts and bringing 'flavor' to the Skylands.

story.content: Gourmet Gusto is the chef counterpart of Gusto in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He was first released in May 2015 and is the final Skylander to be exclusive to the Lost Islands title.

content: Gourmet Gusto is bringing some flavor to the Lost Islands!

trivia: Gourmet Gusto is the last Skylander exclusive to Lost Islands.
gameplay: In Skylanders: Lost Islands, Gourmet Gusto acts as a playable hero. Like other Alter Egos, he can be used to perform tasks and provide elemental bonuses within the game.
